args:
set -eu
rg -n 'collect_env|parallel|envs|spec_decode|gpu_model_runner|engine core|setup.py|conftest' \
  vllm/setup.py \
  vllm/tests/conftest.py \
  vllm/tests/utils.py \
  vllm/vllm/collect_env.py \
  vllm/vllm/config/parallel.py \
  vllm/vllm/config/vllm.py \
  vllm/vllm/envs.py \
  vllm/tests/v1/e2e/spec_decode/test_spec_decode.py \
  vllm/vllm/v1/engine/core.py \
  vllm/vllm/v1/engine/core_client.py \
  vllm/vllm/v1/engine/utils.py \
  vllm/vllm/v1/utils.py \
  vllm/vllm/v1/worker/gpu_model_runner.py >/dev/null
trace_dir=$(mktemp -d)
trace_path="$trace_dir/config.trace.fozzy"
fozzy run tests/shrink.cache_invalidation_regression.fozzy.json --det --record "$trace_path" --json >/dev/null
fozzy shrink "$trace_path" --json | jq -e '.outTrace and .summary.mode == "run"' >/dev/null
printf 'shrink-vllm-config-runtime\n'
